assertions.title: GET /api/calls returns JSON array of Call objects with all fields, sorted reverse-chronologically

steps.expected: id, callStatus, name, phone, request, callDuration, timestamp, etc.

assertions.issues: Google Sheets API authentication failure - service account may not have access to the sheet. Cannot verify data structure or sorting without successful API connection.

assertions.title: GET /api/calls returns [] with status 200 when sheet is empty

steps.action: Send GET request when sheet empty

evidence.note: Same endpoint as VAL-API-001, blocked by same issue

assertions.issues: Cannot test empty sheet scenario because the Google Sheets API connection is failing with authentication error. The empty sheet test requires the API connection to work first.

assertions.title: GET /api/calls returns { error: '...' } with status 500 on Sheets API error

steps.action: Send GET request with Sheets API error
steps.observed: { error: 'Failed to fetch calls' } with status 500

assertions.title: GET /api/calls/stats returns object with totalCalls, answeredCount, voicemailCount, qualifiedLeads, averageDuration, callsPerDay

steps.action: Verify callsPerDay is array of 14 days

assertions.issues: Google Sheets API authentication failure prevents testing the stats endpoint. Cannot verify stat calculations without working data source.

blockers.description: Google Sheets API authentication failure - both /api/calls and /api/calls/stats return 500 errors with 'Failed to fetch calls' / 'Failed to fetch call stats' messages. Service account may lack access to the spreadsheet.
blockers.quickFixAttempted: Retried requests multiple times, verified server is running on port 3000, confirmed 500 status code with proper error object structure

summary: Tested 4 assertions: 1 passed (VAL-API-003), 3 blocked (VAL-API-001, VAL-API-002, VAL-API-004). VAL-API-003 passed because the API correctly returns an error object with status 500 when the Sheets API fails. The other assertions are blocked by Google Sheets authentication issues that prevent the API from fetching data.
